text:
## Open PRs with >400 additions, not closing any Linear issue

**Counts by repository:**
| Repository | Count |
|---|---|
| acme/infra | 3 |
| acme/mobile | 2 |
| acme/web | 1 |
| **Total** | **6** |

**PR with the most additions:**
- **#1044** in `acme/infra` — *"Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: add test for ios18-crash"* — **653 additions** (author: heidi)

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'github_pull_requests'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT 
  repo,
  COUNT(*) AS repo_count
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'open'
  AND additions > 400
  AND (closes_linear IS NULL OR closes_linear = '')
GROUP BY repo
ORDER BY repo_count DESC"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT 
  repo,
  number,
  title,
  additions,
  author
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'open'
  AND additions > 400
  AND (closes_linear IS NULL OR closes_linear = '')
ORDER BY additions DESC
LIMIT 1"}

data: {"rows":[{"repo":"acme/infra","number":1044,"title":"Mobile crash on iOS 18 cold start: add test for ios18-crash","additions":653,"author":"heidi"}],"truncated":false,"touched":[{"name":"github_pull_requests","source":"virtual","access":"read","op":"select","volatility":"stable","bindings":{"state":…(+28)

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT COUNT(*) AS total
FROM github_pull_requests
WHERE state = 'open'
  AND additions > 400
  AND (closes_linear IS NULL OR closes_linear = '')"}
